question: As of 2026-05-03, how many countries' leaders will participate in the 8th European Political Community Summit in Yerevan on May 4, 2026?
resolution_detail: The summit was held in Yerevan with leaders from nearly 50 countries participating, placing the attendance in the 45-50 countries range.
event_summary: 2026-05-04 | wikipedia_current_events | 8th European Political Community Summit | The 8th European Political Community Summit is held in Yerevan, Armenia, with leaders from nearly 50 countries participating.

question: As of 2026-02-28, what year-over-year passenger traffic change range will Dubai International Airport report for March 2026?
options: A. Increase or less than 10% decline
resolution_detail: Dubai International Airport reported a 66% drop in passenger traffic for March 2026, placing it in the 50% or greater decline bucket.
event_name: Dubai International Airport March 2026 passenger traffic
event_summary: 2026-05-04 | wikipedia_current_events | Dubai International Airport | The Dubai International Airport in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, reports a 66% drop in passenger traffic in March 2026 amidst a disruption of air traffic in the Middle East due to the Iran war.

question: As of 2026-05-04, how many votes in favor will the no-confidence motion against Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan receive in Romania's Parliament on May 5, 2026?
resolution_detail: Romania's Parliament passed the no-confidence motion by a 281-4 vote, so the number of votes in favor fell in the 261-300 range.
event_name: Romanian Parliament no-confidence vote against Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan
event_summary: 2026-05-05 | wikipedia_current_events | Parliament of Romania | The Parliament of Romania votes 281–4 to pass a motion of no confidence, called by the Social Democratic Party and Alliance for the Union of Romanians, against prime minister Ilie Bolojan. (AP)

question: As of 2026-05-06, what prison sentence length will the Seoul High Court impose on former South Korean prime minister Han Duck-soo in its appellate ruling related to the 2024 martial law declaration?
options: A. 0 years, with no prison sentence imposed
B. More than 0 years and less than 15 years
C. 15 years to less than 23 years
resolution_detail: On May 7, 2026, the Seoul High Court reduced Han Duck-soo's sentence from 23 years to 15 years, placing it in the 15 years to less than 23 years range.
event_name: Han Duck-soo appellate sentence in the South Korean martial law case
event_summary: 2026-05-07 | wikipedia_current_events | 2024 South Korean martial law crisis | The Seoul High Court reduces former South Korean prime minister Han Duck-soo 's prison sentence from 23 years to 15 years for crimes related to former president Yoon Suk Yeol 's 2024 martial law declaration, citing a lack of evidence that Han played a leading or premeditated role in the declaration.

question: As of 2026-05-06, what publicly reported diplomatic outcome will Cambodia and Thailand reach in their leaders' talks on the sidelines of the 48th ASEAN Summit?
options: B. Continuation of talks or truce without an agreement to restore relations
C. Breakdown of talks without a joint diplomatic outcome
D. Escalation or withdrawal from the talks
resolution_detail: On May 7, 2026, Cambodia and Thailand agreed to restore relations after talks mediated by the Philippines at the ASEAN Summit, matching option A.
event_name: Cambodia-Thailand border crisis ASEAN Summit talks
event_summary: 2026-05-07 | wikipedia_current_events | 2025 Cambodian–Thai border crisis | Cambodia and Thailand agree to restore relations following talks mediated by the Philippines on the sidelines of the 48th ASEAN Summit in Cebu. (Bangkok Post)

question: As of 2026-05-06, what eligibility status will the International Olympic Committee set for Belarusian athletes for the Olympic Games from 2028 onward?
options: A. Eligible without the special neutral-athlete restrictions imposed after the invasion of Ukraine
B. Eligible only as individual neutral athletes
D. No formal status change announced
resolution_detail: On May 7, 2026, the IOC lifted restrictions on Belarusian athletes participating in the Olympic Games from 2028, placing them in the unrestricted eligibility category.
event_name: IOC eligibility decision for Belarusian athletes from the 2028 Olympic Games
event_summary: 2026-05-07 | wikipedia_current_events | International sporting sanctions during the Russian invasion of Ukraine | The International Olympic Committee lifts restrictions on Belarusian athletes participating in the Olympic Games from 2028, while Russian athletes remain limited to individual neutral participation because of the Russian Olympic Committee 's suspension. (AFP via RFI)

question: As of 2026-05-06, what formal outcome will the Solomon Islands Parliament reach on the no-confidence motion against Prime Minister Jeremiah Manele on May 7, 2026?
options: A. The motion passes and Manele is ousted as prime minister
B. The motion fails and Manele remains prime minister
C. Parliament does not reach a formal vote on the motion that day
resolution_detail: On May 7, 2026, Jeremiah Manele was ousted after losing the parliamentary confidence vote, so the motion passed.
event_name: Solomon Islands no-confidence motion against Prime Minister Jeremiah Manele
event_summary: 2026-05-07 | wikipedia_current_events | Politics of Solomon Islands | The parliament of the Solomon Islands debates a no-confidence motion against prime minister Jeremiah Manele. The debate is a culmination of a political crisis that started with mass resignations of the cabinet on 16 March, recently escalated by a ruling on 1 May by the Court of Appeal ordering the reconvening of Parliament.

question: As of 2026-05-06, what formal disposition will the U.S. Court of International Trade reach on the Trump administration's 10% global tariffs in its ruling?
options: A. Uphold the tariffs as lawful
C. Dismiss or avoid a merits ruling on legality
resolution_detail: On May 7, 2026, the U.S. Court of International Trade ruled that the 10% global tariffs imposed by President Donald Trump were illegal, matching option B.
event_name: U.S. Court of International Trade ruling on Trump administration global tariffs
event_summary: 2026-05-07 | wikipedia_current_events | Tariffs in the second Trump administration | The U.S. Court of International Trade rules that the 10% global tariffs imposed by president Donald Trump are illegal.

question: As of 2026-05-07, how many votes in favor will Rumen Radev receive in the National Assembly vote on becoming prime minister of Bulgaria?
resolution_detail: Rumen Radev was elected prime minister by a National Assembly vote of 124 in favor, 70 against, and 36 abstentions, placing the result in the 121-130 votes range.
event_name: Bulgarian National Assembly vote on Rumen Radev's premiership
event_summary: 2026-05-08 | wikipedia_current_events | 2026 Bulgarian parliamentary election | Rumen Radev is sworn in as prime minister of Bulgaria after being elected in a vote of 124–70, with 36 abstentions at the National Assembly.

question: As of 2026-01-31, which candidate will be elected president in Costa Rica's 2026 general election?
resolution_detail: Laura Fernández Delgado won the 2026 Costa Rican presidential election and was sworn in as president on May 8, 2026, so option A is correct.

question: As of 2026-05-06, which party will win the most seats in the 2026 Scottish Parliament election?
resolution_detail: The Scottish National Party claimed victory in Scotland after the 2026 Scottish Parliament election, placing the result in the Scottish National Party option.

question: As of 2026-05-06, what publicly reported status will the Iran-U.S. ceasefire have by the end of May 8, 2026?
options: A. No public accusation that the United States violated the ceasefire
B. A public accusation that the United States violated the ceasefire, with no Iranian military response against U.S. vessels reported
C. A public accusation that the United States violated the ceasefire, with an Iranian military response against U.S. vessels reported
D. Another publicly reported ceasefire status
resolution_detail: By May 8, Iran publicly accused the United States of violating the ceasefire and confirmed that Iran responded by attacking U.S. military vessels east of the Strait of Hormuz and south of Chabahar.
event_name: Iran-U.S. ceasefire status after Strait of Hormuz attacks
event_summary: 2026-05-08 | wikipedia_current_events | Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters | Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters spokesperson Ebrahim Zolfaghari accuses the U.S. of violating the ceasefire after it targeted two ships at the Strait of Hormuz and strikes in the Hormozgan province, including Bandar Khamir, Sirik, and Qeshm Island yesterday. He also confirmed that Iran responded by attacking U.S. military vessels east of the waterway and south of Chabahar port. (AA)

question: As of 2026-05-08, which party's candidate will win the 2026 Farrer by-election for the Australian House of Representatives?
options: D. Independent or another party candidate
resolution_detail: David Farley of One Nation won the Farrer by-election and was elected to the Australian House of Representatives, so the correct party category is One Nation.
event_summary: 2026-05-09 | wikipedia_current_events | 2026 Farrer by-election | MP David Farley becomes the first One Nation candidate elected to the Australian House of Representatives.

options: D. No prime minister sworn in by May 31, 2026

event_summary: 2026-05-09 | wikipedia_current_events | 2026 Hungarian parliamentary election | Péter Magyar of the Tisza Party is sworn in as the prime minister of Hungary, ending the 16-year tenure of Fidesz 's Viktor Orbán.

question: As of 2026-05-07, what will Ukrainian officials report about Russian strikes on Kharkiv city during the first 24 hours of the announced three-day Russia-Ukraine ceasefire?
options: A. No Russian strike on Kharkiv city is reported by Ukrainian officials
B. A Russian strike on Kharkiv city is reported, but not as hitting a residential building
C. A Russian strike on Kharkiv city is reported as hitting a residential building
resolution_detail: Kharkiv Oblast governor Oleh Syniehubov reported that a Russian drone struck a residential building in Kharkiv less than 24 hours into the ceasefire, matching option C.
event_name: Kharkiv strike during announced May 2026 Russia-Ukraine ceasefire
event_summary: 2026-05-09 | wikipedia_current_events | Kharkiv strikes (2022–present) | Kharkiv Oblast governor Oleh Syniehubov says that a Russian drone has struck a residential building in Kharkiv during the beginning of the 3-day ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine.

event_summary: 2026-05-09 | wikipedia_current_events | National Assembly | The National Assembly of Hungary reconvenes for the first time since the election as elected members are sworn in. Ágnes Forsthoffer is elected as speaker.

question: As of 2026-05-09, what publicly reported status will Iran's response to the latest U.S. ceasefire proposal have by the end of May 10, 2026?
options: A. No publicly confirmed Iranian response delivered
B. Response delivered through Pakistan or another third-party intermediary
C. Response delivered directly to U.S. officials without a third-party intermediary
D. Iran publicly rejects or withdraws from the proposal without delivering a response
resolution_detail: On May 10, 2026, Iranian state TV said Iran had sent its response via Pakistan, and Pakistan's prime minister confirmed receipt, placing the outcome in the intermediary-delivery category.
event_name: Iran's response to the U.S. ceasefire proposal
event_summary: 2026-05-10 | wikipedia_current_events | 2026 Iran war ceasefire | Iranian state TV says that Iran has sent its response to the latest ceasefire proposal from the United States via Pakistan. Pakistani prime minister Shehbaz Sharif confirms that his country received the response. (Reuters)
